title: Ultimate Backport Mod
description: Play these cool things of new Minecraft updates in old versions!
body:
# 🌟 Ultimate Backport Mod – Bringing the Future to the Past!

Welcome to the official page of the **Ultimate Backport Mod (UBM)** – a project that breathes new life into old Minecraft versions by bringing **modern mechanics, features, and mobs** back to where it all began.

## 🔥 Highlights

✨ **Command Suggestion UI** Tired of blindly typing commands in older versions? UBM brings the modern **command autocomplete system** into legacy Minecraft – making commands easier, faster, and more intuitive.

🗳️ **Mob Vote Candidates – The Forgotten Return** Remember the mobs from the community votes that never made it into the game? They’re finally here – reimagined and added into your worlds! (More will be added step by step!)

⚙️ **Full Mob Customization.** Every mob is fully configurable (Coming Soon):

*   Enable/disable them
*   Adjust health, damage, and more
*   Tailor the gameplay exactly to your taste

⏳ **Modern Mechanics in Old Versions** From combat tweaks to quality-of-life improvements – UBM carefully backports features from newer updates into **1.12.2** while keeping the nostalgic charm intact.

## 🛠️ Supported Versions

Currently, UBM is being developed for **Minecraft 1.12.2**. Other versions (like 1.7.10, 1.14.4, and 1.16.5) may follow after the core development is complete.

## 📢 Development Status

This mod was once discontinued – but now it’s being **revived, rebuilt, and expanded** with fresh ideas and a long-term vision. Stay tuned, join the community, and help shape the future of UBM!

👉 [Join our Discord](https://discord.gg/cn7NGYe9fB)

## 🎯 Download Goals (CurseForge + Modrinth)

*   **10.000 Downloads ✅**
*   **20.000 Downloads ✅**
*   **30.000 Downloads ✅**
*   **40.000 Downloads ✅**
*   **50.000 Downloads ✅**
*   **100.000 Downloads ❌**
*   **500.000 Downloads ❌**
*   **1.000.000 Downloads ❌**

✨ **Thank you so much for supporting the Ultimate Backport Mod!** Every download brings us closer to reviving Minecraft’s history with the magic of its future.
